strings.welcome:
Welcome! I'm your travel assistant.
I can help you search and book flights, hotels, or packages — manage an existing booking — or connect you with our support team.
What can I help you with today?
strings.handoff_success: I've connected you with the right specialist.
strings.session_goodbye: Thank you for using our travel service. Have a great trip!
strings.routing_error: I'm having trouble understanding your request. Let me connect you with someone who can help.
strings.agent_unavailable_msg: That service is temporarily unavailable. Let me try an alternative.
strings.timeout_msg: I apologize for the delay. Let me try again.
